title: The Account of the Conquest of Masabadhan
description: According to al-Sari-Shu'ayb--Sayf-Talhah, Muhammad, Muhallab, 'Amr and Said: When Hashim b. 'Utbah returned from Jalula' to al-Madi'in, the news reached Said that Adhin b. al-Hurmuzan had brought together a military force with which he had marched to the plain. Sa'd wrote about this development to'Umar who wrote back, "Send I)irir b. al-Khattib with an army to stop them; set over its vanguard Ibn al-Hudhayl al-Asadi and over its two wings'Abdallah b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 13
